sub_modules.usm_window_zero_pad: Combinational 3x3 window boundary handler. Applies zero-padding to unavailable top and left stencil taps and forwards the aligned original pixel.
sub_modules.usm_gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil stage using fixed coefficients [1 2 1; 2 4 2; 1 2 1] normalized by 16.
sub_modules.usm_highfreq_subtract: Combinational pointwise stage computing signed high-frequency detail as original minus blurred.
sub_modules.usm_gain_scale: Combinational pointwise signed multiplier that scales the high-frequency component by the runtime gain input.
sub_modules.usm_reconstruct_saturate: Combinational pointwise reconstruction and saturation stage that adds scaled detail back to the original pixel and clamps to the output pixel range.
